admin.usersDescription: Manage roles and assign a dedicated consultant to each user.
admin.operatorsDescription: Add or remove operators and assign users to them.
admin.consultantsDescription: Add or remove consultants available for assignment.

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started With the CBAM-Estimator
gettingStarted.subtitle: Emission Collection App
gettingStarted.description: Welcome to our Emission Collection App. This platform is designed to help suppliers from non-EU countries report their CBAM-related emissions to their European customers in a secure and efficient manner. Please note that the reported emissions cannot be used directly for CBAM reporting, as they must be verified by an independent verifier.
gettingStarted.customersLabel: Customers who have requested emission data from you:

cannotProvide.label: I cannot provide the requested data for this CN Code
cannotProvide.contactExpert: Contact our expert to help provide emissions for your customer

reportingPeriod.label: Reporting Period: {period}
reportingPeriod.tooltip: Please report the emission data that you have collected during the specified reporting period or, if the reporting period lies partly in the future, the data you expect to have. If in doubt, please report the most recent data available.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Make changes to your profile here.

consultDialog.title: Consult our Experts
consultDialog.description: Our experts can help you review your emission data and address any related issues. Our team brings extensive experience in CBAM-related emissions data collection and compliance.
